d:
Passive. When Athalia is defeated, her unyielding resolve manifests as a lance that continues to attack enemies on the battlefield, with her ATK reduced by [[35%]].
Active. Athalia leaps into the air and strikes the enemy with the highest cumulative damage dealt, dealing [[150%]]<ATK> true damage plus extra true damage equal to [[30%]] of all enemies' total HP lost she has recorded. The extra true damage cannot exceed [[1500%]]<ATK>. Enemies hit are knocked down for [[0.5]]s, and Athalia remains [[invincible]] while casting this skill. After using this skill, she resets her record of enemies' HP loss to zero.
Increases the true damage dealt to [[180%]]<ATK> when this skill is used actively.
Increases the true damage dealt to [[210%]]<ATK> when this skill is used actively.
Increases the true damage dealt to [[240%]]<ATK> when this skill is used actively.
Increases the true damage dealt to [[270%]]<ATK> when this skill is used actively.

Athalia targets the enemy with the highest cumulative damage dealt and dashes to the tile behind them. The dash deals [[360%]]<ATK> damage to the target and [[280%]]<ATK> damage to enemies in its path. Athalia is [[invincible]] during the dash.
Increases the damage dealt to the target to [[400%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to the target to [[440%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to the target to [[480%]]<ATK>.

Athalia transforms into a lance, striking adjacent enemies 6 times, with each hit dealing [[20%]]<ATK> damage. While casting this skill, Athalia becomes [[unaffected]], reduces damage taken by [[60%]], and recovers [[150%]]<ATK> HP.
Each hit deals [[25%]]<ATK> damage.
Each hit deals [[30%]]<ATK> damage.
Each hit deals [[35%]]<ATK> damage.
Increases Crit by [[12]] during battle. When dealing damage to the enemy with the highest cumulative damage dealt, Crit is further increased by [[30]].
Increases Crit by [[16]] during battle. When dealing damage to the enemy with the highest cumulative damage dealt, Crit is further increased by [[40]].
Increases Crit by [[20]] during battle. When dealing damage to the enemy with the highest cumulative damage dealt, Crit is further increased by [[50]].

Every second use of Vengeance Charge, Athalia's dash simultaneously unleashes Sacred Slashes, striking the two [[straight paths]] with the most enemies. Each slash deals [[200%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies in its paths. These slashes prioritize [[straight paths]] that do not overlap with the dash path of the Vengeance Charge that triggers them.
Increases the impact damage to [[240%]]<ATK>.
Increases the impact damage to [[280%]]<ATK>.
While casting Vengeance Charge, Athalia increases her Execution by [[50]]. Whenever she [[assists or defeats]] an enemy or uses her Ultimate, the cooldown of Vengeance Charge resets immediately.
Vengeance Charge and Sacred Slash can reduce the target's shield value, up to [[800%]]<ATK>.
